problem_statement: Matt can't sustain 1-1 investor pitches at scale while building product. 200 outbounds -> 50 qualified -> 7-8 strategic. Needs to scale investor outreach without losing personal quality.

engagement_tracks.name: Agentic Forms Landing Page
engagement_tracks.description: Video pitch + agentic intake. Educates, qualifies, determines investor fit. Trained on Matt's deck, data, delivery, voice. Mix of deterministic and generative logic.
